merged_events.event_description: The American Consulate General at Freetown was elevated to Embassy status upon Sierra Leone's independence, with Herbert Reiner, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on April 27, 1961, when the American Consulate General at Freetown was elevated to Embassy status, with Herbert Reiner, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1961-04-27) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms the American Consulate General at Freetown was elevated to Embassy status upon Sierra Leone's independence.
